name: stockflow-pos-client
description: StockFlow POS Terminal — Aplicación de escritorio Electron para ventas en sucursal

scripts.dev: concurrently "vite --mode electron" "wait-on http://localhost:5174 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.release:desktop:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:TEMP='c:\stockflow\pos-client\.tmp'; $env:TMP='c:\stockflow\pos-client\.tmp'; npm run build:electron; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx electron-builder"
